title: malaxis ochreata
intro: Malaxis ochreata, also known as the yellow-fringed orchid, is a species of orchid native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Malaxis ochreata include its potential to aid in wound healing and to reduce the severity of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Malaxis ochreata typically involve the plant's roots and flowers being dried and made into teas, capsules, or tinctures for medicinal use.
